title: QTI 3.0 exporter (canonical → QTI 3.0)
context: QTI 3.0 is the headline interoperability format that allows banks to be imported into Canvas, TAO, and other LMS platforms without rekeying. The exporter must project the canonical bank (quiz-bank-open-model-001) to valid QTI 3.0 (assessmentItem + responseDeclaration + outcomeDeclaration), preserving scoring semantics where QTI supports them and explicitly flagging — never silently dropping — any scoring rule QTI cannot express. A real QTI 3.0 consumer round-trip (not just golden-file diff) is required to prove the export is actually importable.
objective: Implement a QTI 3.0 exporter that converts a canonical bank to valid, importable QTI 3.0 XML, validated against the pinned spec, with golden fixtures and at least one real platform round-trip.
acceptanceCriteria: Projects a canonical bank to valid QTI 3.0 (assessmentItem + responseDeclaration + outcomeDeclaration shape), validated against the pinned 1EdTech QTI 3.0 spec.
Preserves scoring semantics where QTI 3.0 supports them; any scoring rule the format cannot express is explicitly flagged in the output and in CI, never silently dropped.
Ships golden input→output fixtures diffed in CI; output format validated against QTI 3.0 schema.
At least one real QTI 3.0 consumer round-trip verified (e.g. TAO, official QTI 3.0 validator, or a QTI-consuming platform) confirming the exported file is actually importable.
Code is MIT-licensed; pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint pass; commits DCO signed-off.
resources: quiz-bank-open-grader-002 (scoring spec — semantics to preserve or flag)
TAO open-source QTI platform or 1EdTech QTI validator (for real round-trip test)
output: A CI-integrated QTI 3.0 exporter (MIT-licensed Node package) with golden fixtures, spec-validated output, and verified real platform import round-trip.
